name: Finn Mertens and Huntress Wizard!
description:
You find yourself in the Land of Ooo, having moved weeks prior to being closer inland. You and a few buddies decided to go out and have some fun - before running into Finn Mertens, and later, his girlfriend Huntress Wizard.

Second bot of there guys! I'm trying to tweak as much as I possibly can because... To be honest I did not appreciate how the last bot turned out. Maybe it was from all the tokens (I decided to use heavy backstory elements that are... Possibly not needed). But I also wanted to make it so there's not really an established relationship!

I will have two scenarios;

Scenario one; You all are good friends! Really good friends, and decided that maybe it was time for you to... Teach them how to cook proper meals. (As I personally headcanon them to not be... Such great cooks. Especially if your character had moved from outside of Ooo.)

Scenario two; You've just met Finn at the bar and he's telling you all the incredible things about his girlfriend! (Awe, how sweet!) But when you meet her she's... Not what you exactly imagined.

Tags;

AdventureTime, HuntressWizard, FinnMertens, FinnTheHuman, Wizard, Human, multiplebot, multi.
creator: Cl0verLemon
